original_name: イチゴ哀歌～雑で生イキな妹と割り切れない兄～
name: イチゴ哀歌～雑で生イキな妹と割り切れない兄～
title: イチゴ哀歌 雑で生イキな妹と割り切れない兄
overview_en: The story centers on a pair of stepsiblings When Kōta s father gets remarried Kōta s first impression of his new stepsister Aika is that she is beautiful but that image is shattered pretty quickly His new stepsister is a super sassy and foul mouthed gyaru who behaves uncontrollably while their parents are away making Kōta s life a living hell However their relationship begins to change when Aika gradually warms up to Kōta s caring older brother nature
